# Jixue Xuan

> Jixue Xuan is an independent Chinese metaphysics utility site for structured charting, reference lookup, and image export. It does not publish fortune-telling conclusions or omen judgement copy.

## Core URLs

- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/ - Xuan tools homepage.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools - Complete tool catalogue.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/bazi - Bazi professional chart.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/ziwei - Zi Wei Dou Shu chart.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/liuyao - Liu Yao Na Jia chart.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/meihua - Mei Hua Yi Shu chart.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/qimen - Qi Men Dun Jia quick chart.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/daliuren - Da Liu Ren four lessons and three transmissions.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/calendar - Single-day almanac review with purpose-based action summary.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/date-selection - Date selection candidate list by purpose.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/daily-fortune - Daily action review with zodiac clash and almanac fields.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/tools/shichen - Time-branch candidate selector and reference table.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/classics - Classics and reference entry.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/knowledge - Workflow diagrams and knowledge entry.

## Site Signals

- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/sitemap.xml - Public sitemap.
- https://xuan.liujixue.cn/robots.txt - Crawling policy.
- https://liujixue.cn/ - Main personal studio site.

## Content Boundaries

- Outputs are structured charting and reference utilities.
- The site avoids deterministic good-or-bad judgement text.
- API routes are private operational surfaces.
